title: CONDENSATION OF ALDEHYDES WITH AMIDES. PART XIII. OF DIHYDROCINNAMALDEHYDE
author: KANTILAL C. PANDYA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Condensation of dihydrocinnamaldehyde with some amides has been described. Formamide does not appear to condense at all ; the others give a  bisamide  product. The presence of pyridine is not helpful occasionally it gives resin and diminishes the yield . The yields are a little smaller than those obtained from cinnamaldehyde the highest here did not exceed 42%.
steps_raw: Condensation of dihydrocinnamaldehyde with some amides has been described. Formamide does not appear to condense at all ; the others give a  bisamide  product. The yields are a little smaller than those obtained from cinnamaldehyde the highest here did not exceed 42%.
